description_long: This object is a boxy, modern printer with a predominantly gray exterior and a simple, geometric design. The front face features a recessed print slot, a white tray extending outward, and two circular buttons—one orange and one white—alongside a small rectangular display panel. The sides and back are plain, with no visible vents, ports, or additional features, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The print tray is flat and projects from the lower front, likely serving as the output area for printed materials. The overall construction appears to be made of plastic, with a matte finish and hard, smooth surfaces. There are no visible brand logos, power cables, or filament spool holders, and the design is compact and functional, suitable for placement in an office, shop, or urban workspace.
description: A compact, gray printer with a front-facing print slot, two colored buttons, and a white output tray. The design is minimalist and modern, with smooth, hard surfaces and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the print slot, white output tray, two circular buttons (orange and white), and a small display panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain gray side and the extended white tray, with no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless gray back panel with no visible ports or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain gray side and the extended white tray.
attribute_control_panel_design: A small rectangular display panel is located on the upper front face, flanked by two circular buttons (one orange, one white). The layout is simple and minimalistic.
attribute_print_bed_visibility: The print bed (output tray) is visible, extending from the lower front of the printer. It is flat, rectangular, and white.
